1.content:
Now I'll build this skill. It needs to be sharp — read agent files, classify every instruction, then rewrite them with DNA embedded and skills mapped as invokable references.Created a file, read a fileCreated a file, read a fileTo install it, drop the file into your project at:
.claude/skills/agent-dna-classifier/SKILL.md
Then in Claude Code, just say something like:

"Scan my agents and classify DNA vs skills"

Claude will discover all your agent files in .claude/agents/, run every instruction through the Stack Swap Test and Role Identity Test, then produce:

Refactored agent files with clean DNA embedded
Extracted skill files in .claude/skills/
A classification report showing exactly what moved where and anything flagged for your review

The key design decision baked in: it always shows you a diff and asks for confirmation before overwriting your existing agent definitions.
